title: extensions.embedder
description: Embedder configuration. Registers an embedder against the active graph so text_score() works inside Cypher. The model string routes internally to either the fastembed-python catalog or the direct-ONNX bge-m3 backend.

backend.description: Embedder backend. Currently only 'fastembed' is supported.

model.description: Model identifier. 'BAAI/bge-m3' routes through a direct-ONNX backend; the rest route through fastembed-python's catalog.

cooldown.description: Seconds of inactivity after which the embedder releases its ONNX session. 0 disables the release (model stays resident forever). bge-m3 only: other models ignore this field.
